ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "dem" REAL /* Digital Elevation Model (DEM) value at the station's location */,
  "slope" REAL /* Slope value of the terrain at the station's location */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensors used at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "present_tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded on that date */,
  "present_tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded on that date */,
  "ldaps_rhmin" REAL /* Minimum relative humidity recorded */,
  "ldaps_rhmax" REAL /* Maximum relative humidity recorded */,
  "ldaps_ws" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "ldaps_lh" REAL /* Latent heat value recorded */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation received */,
  "next_tmax" REAL /* Predicted maximum temperature for the following day */,
  "next_tmin" REAL /* Predicted minimum temperature for the following day */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation recorded */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of sky covered by clouds */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_levels" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the humidity observation */,
  "min_rh" REAL /* Minimum relative humidity recorded */,
  "max_rh" REAL /* Maximum relative humidity recorded */,
  "average_rh" REAL /* Average relative humidity for the day */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_levels_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_radiation" (
  "radiation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radiation record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the solar radiation data was collected */,
  "solar_value" REAL /* Value of solar radiation recorded */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index for the day */,
  "irradiance" REAL /* Direct and diffuse solar irradiance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radiation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_radiation_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the wind speed observation */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Value of wind speed recorded */,
  "gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind gust speed recorded */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speed_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predicted_temperatures" (
  "predicted_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predicted temperature record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the prediction pertains */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "next_tmax" REAL /* Predicted maximum temperature for the following day */,
  "next_tmin" REAL /* Predicted minimum temperature for the following day */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the temperature prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("predicted_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predicted_temperatures_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station from which data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of data access */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
